final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, avatar-crop-friendly (square format, subject centered with clear focal point)
Subject: must include a visual concept that communicates technology, new energy / EV, digital gadgets, and lifestyle — exact symbolic representation is yours
Scene/backdrop: needs a simple, uncluttered backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, positive, energetic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that reads as tech-forward yet warm and approachable — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and visually harmonious across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture
Avoid: political symbols, religious iconography, culturally sensitive color combinations, human faces or identifiable figures, aggressive or divisive imagery
